title: 18th Birthday Balloons,15pcs Gold Silver Black Birthday Metallic Balloons for Women Men Birthday Party
features: 🎂【18th Birthday Balloons】:The package include 15pcs 18 balloons,all the size is 12 inch.All the balloons are printed with number “18”.
🎂【Good Quality】:All the 18 balloons are made of high quality,non-toxic and durable,can be filled with both air and helium.
🎂【Easy to Blow up】:The 18 balloons include 3 colors,black,silver and gold,5pcs in each color.Enough for you to celebrate the birthday party.
🎂【Wide Application】:The bright color 18 balloons will be the best choice for you to celebrate the birthday party,can be use as background,will crate strong atmosphere.
🎂【Customer Service】:If you have any questions,please feel free to contact us,we will try our best to solve it for you.
